race.comment: DEBUSSY (2) trained locally and has excellent fresh credentials. Kicks off in a winnable race and wasn't asked to do much in a recent 800m trial. Genuine contender. CATCHY TUNES (12) Gosford-trained mare who was in a different class last time demolishing her rivals over this trip at Queanbeyan in slick timer. Well drawn and she finds a winnable race. ALTERCATION (9) drifted back early when no match for Escargoes over 1100m at Hawkesbury. Proven in the going and will find this more to her liking. THE PICCOLINO (10) can overcome the weight increase and awkward gate after scoring a convincing victory over this track and trip in the heavy going. Keep safe.
